TRIAL RESET TO AUG-04-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-12-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERONE, ADRIAN P IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RACK SOLID, LLC. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT SUPPORT PLAINTIFF'S BURDEN OF PROOF BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT AN ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF PLAINTIFF'S LOSS, DAMAGE OR HARM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
